# Release v0.2.2

Initial public release with verified MiniMax Global Model Provider integration.

## Verified Working

- MiniMax as Global Model Provider in Settings -> Model Providers
- MiniMax selectable in Agent Model Provider Dropdown
- All 8 MiniMax models (M3, M2.7, M2.5, M2.1, M2)
- Tool Calling, Vision, Video, Thinking support
- Full Anthropic-SDK compatibility

## Pre-installed

- Langflow latest
- ffmpeg, Chromium (puppeteer)
- Node.js 20, yt-dlp, langchain-anthropic
